title: cenchrus echinatus var. longispinus
intro: Cenchrus echinatus var. longispinus, also known as the long-spine sandbur or sandbur grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cenchrus echinatus var. longispinus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
